description: Style NoteGive your casual summer wardrobe a stylish spin with this top from allen solly. Its cotton and linen composition wicks away sweat and keeps you dry all day long. Team it with denim jeans and slip-ons for a casual look or with a pencil skirt and jacket for a semi-formal look.Product DetailsDark orange shirt with mandarin collar, full placket with brown buttons, yoke at front with tucks, yoke at back with gathers, short sleeves with upturned hem and buttoned tab, curved hemMaterial and Care67% linen and 33% cottonMachine wash with like coloursMedium heat ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8'' chest 33'') is wearing a size M
